title: Aldehydes Group - Canada.ca
content:
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP). The assessment focused on 5 substances referred to collectively under the CMP as the Aldehydes Group.
- Summary of publications
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
None planned at this time
Benzaldehyde, methyl-

Publication of the final assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 158, No. 21 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 156, No. 41 .
